Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fallen Leaf School]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The Fallen Leaf School holds a monopoly on most trees that can produce spirit-fruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The Fallen Leaf School has a life aspect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Fallen Leaf School processes orus fruits into products and secret elixirs.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Fallen Leaf School has security to prevent fruit stealing.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — The Fallen Leaf School consists of artists who were recently fought by Orthos.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The base of the Fallen Leaf School is a potential destination for the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Fallen Leaf School is a group that would not protect the exiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — The Fallen Leaf School has thirty-two Jades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — The Fallen Leaf School is located just outside a lonely corner where Yerin was sitting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Fallen Leaf School has methods of contacting other schools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Cloudships were confiscated from the Fallen Leaf School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Fallen Leaf School is the location of Orthos.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
